allow: Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x INTEGER\)'\); console.log\('node:sqlite works'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('core.items count:', j.core.items.length\);console.log\('lines count:', j.lines.length\);console.log\('sample core.items:', JSON.stringify\(j.core.items.slice\(0,5\),null,1\).slice\(0,800\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./data/assets/manifest.json'\); console.log\('names:', Object.keys\(m.names\).length\); console.log\('samples:', m.names['divine'], '|', m.names['hinekoras-lock'], '|', m.names['greater-orb-of-transmutation'], '|', m.names['annul']\);")
